top_findings.summary: The skill requests full authentication credentials (email and password) for HBO Max, which is excessive for its stated purpose of streaming content and managing watchlists. While the skill offers a manual login option, requiring full credentials (via environment variables) gives the skill complete account access beyond what's needed for basic streaming interactions. A more minimal approach would be to only use session-based authentication or temporary tokens without requiring permanent credentials.
top_findings.impact: OVERREACH: Data Over-collection - The skill requests full authentication credentials (email and password) for HBO Max, which is excessive for its stated purpose of streaming content and managing watchlists. While the skill offers a manual login option, requiring full credentials (via environment variables) gives the skill complete account access beyond what's needed for basic streaming interactions. A more minimal approach would be to only use session-based authentication or temporary tokens without requiring permanent credentials.
